text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital charges through! At<n>home on turf
and dirt, this wonder has<n>shown us her strength
today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... I did it... I spent all mystrength... with none to spare even formy oshis...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: The sky is... so... far...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: But there's a light...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ah, this light...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Thunk!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Digital?! Wake up, Digital!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Mmm... Uhh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Opera O... and... Doto?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank goodness you woke up. I<n>didn't know
what to do.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-thanks... I'm still inexperienced,<n>but I knew if I
didn't push myself to<n>the limit, I wouldn't be able
to see the<n>same scenery as my oshis.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But forget about that. What are you<n>two doing
here?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We were watching you in secret<n>since before the
race began, clad in<n>the garb of stadium vendors.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to bother you, so that's<n>why I didn't
speak to you in the<n>paddock.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ah, that explains that feeling I had...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's incredible! I can't believe you<n>two would
go to the trouble of coming<n>to see me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Um... I should say... I think I learned a<n>little
something today!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I caught a glipse of why you, Opera O,<n>forge such a
bold path—and why you,<n>Doto, chase glory so
dazzlingly!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I finally get it... at least a little...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! You don't say.<n>Although, I would be
remiss if I failed<n>to point out that my magnificence
was<n>inherited at birth.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But if you're intent on worshipping<n>me so, why
don't I show you<n>something even more
resplendent?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Of course, I'm speaking of our very<n>first
competitive performance, a<n>showdown between
Doto and<n>myself.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ooh... a showdown! Unbelievable!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm finally running a G1. Of<n>course, I'm just
one of many though.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
But I finally get to run with my hero<n>Opera O at the
Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hrngh!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Digital!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The heavens crumble! My oshis are<n>going big?!
This is like a dome<n>concert-level holy event!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to prepare a feast for the<n>goddesses in
appreciation of how<n>good I'm eating right now!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! By all means, come and<n>watch. In
return...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
There is an arc to your story which<n>you have not
yet revealed. Is this not<n>so?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I hear talk of you being a so-called<n>"all-rounder"
who performs with<n>equally sure footing—no matter
the<n>stage.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Today, you performed on turf. Thus, I<n>expect you
have one more act up<n>your sleeve.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If I'm not mistaken, there is an ideal<n>dirt race
around the same time as the<n>Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A big dirt race held around the same<n>time as the
Takarazuka Kinen...
choice_data_list: You're thinking of the Japan Dirt Derby.
You're thinking of the Japan Dirt Derby.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well done. It seems you have the<n>field already
scoped out.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Please give it some consideration, as<n>reciprocation
for the Takarazuka<n>Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Reciprocation... So, I'm in debt to<n>Opera O and
Doto...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I've got to be there!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The starlit track... The heart-catching<n>course that
illuminates the love in<n>couples' hearts—a second
Tokyo!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Let's run in the Japan<n>Dirt Derby. I
want to show Opera O<n>and Doto what I can do, of
course.<n>But it's not only that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I have to find out if that sparkle... that<n>intensity I
saw today at the NHK Mile<n>Cup...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I have to know if it's the same at G1<n>dirt races
too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Thank you! This time, let us behold<n>the powerful
Umas who cavort across<n>the dirt!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm not picky about tracks or<n>pairings! I'll take
whatever's put in<n>front of me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I don't really get that last part... But<n>either way, it
looks like we have our<n>sights set on the G1 Japan
Dirt Derby<n>next!
